text.title: Weekly GSC Diagnostic Template Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Weekly GSC Diagnostic Template end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: export-7d
step.action: Export last 7 days + prior 7 days CSV; load into spreadsheet/notebook.

step.name: compute-movers
step.action: Sort by abs(clicks_delta); pick top 5 winners + top 5 losers.

step.name: classify-intent
step.action: For each, label query-intent and page-intent; flag mismatches.
step.decision-gate: If mismatches >3, escalate to dedicated audit.

step.name: audit-indexation
step.action: Pull discovered / indexed / excluded; compute ratio.

step.name: archive-snapshot
step.action: Save dated snapshot to /diagnostics/yyyy-ww/; link previous week.
